positive: Stylized vector illustration of a celestial guardian moth, symmetrical, resting on a delicate winding branch. The moth has large, intricately patterned wings resembling mandalas in deep indigo, cyan, and gold foil accents. The composition is centered, showcasing the moth's perfect silhouette against a cosmic backdrop of nebulae and constellations. Art deco floral elements are subtly woven around the branch. Minimalist, high contrast, clean lines, suitable for screen printing or embroidery. Highly detailed, clean vector artwork, flat graphic design style, vibrant yet sophisticated color palette, perfect for apparel print.
negative: blurry, amateur, watermark, signature, text, realistic photo, low resolution, grain, bokeh, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, noise, poor quality
